title: orthosiphon asper
intro: Orthosiphon asper, also known as Asian tea tree or Miswak, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, commonly found in the wild and used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains caffeic acid, which is responsible for its diuretic properties, making it a natural remedy for urinary tract issues and kidney stones. The health benefits of Orthosiphon asper include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an anti-microbial agent, which helps to prevent infections and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Orthosiphon asper are typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
